{{CargoRelic
|name=Virtual Engine
|class_id=20373
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=A new device developed by the Snail Clan, a core component in the construction of a virtual training environment. It also has a small power reactor that can serve as the backup energy source for the training device!
|fame=14
|art=17
|fth=17
|civ=12
|tech=30
|ss1=Per 10 Unknown Records read, Snail ATK +1<br>Unknown Records Read: 400/400
|ss2=Per 10 Unknown Records read, Snail ATK +2<br>Unknown Records Read: 400/400
|ss3=Per 10 Unknown Records read, Snail ATK +3<br>Unknown Records Read: 400/400
|ss4=Per 10 Unknown Records read, Snail ATK +3<br>Unknown Records Read: 400/400
|ss7=Per 10 Unknown Records read, Snail ATK +3<br>Unknown Records Read: 400/400<br> (Awakened)
}}
